name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: re: projections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Just hours to go | Derek --

Right now, with our midnight deadline looming, our fundraising still isn't exactly where we need it to be.

Earlier this week, we had to lower our monthly projections and adjust our goals to account for the slow down.

And we're seeing this trend right as we're making some of the final choices about where to invest in the final leg of this campaign. If it keeps up, we’re going to have to make more tough calls in the coming weeks than any of us had imagined.

We’ll have to choose between getting more organizers on the ground in Ohio or in Florida. We’ll have to decide whether it’s more urgent to air ads in New Hampshire or in Pennsylvania. And because of all that, we could miss connecting with millions of undecided voters.

**[I’ve told you that we’re trying to total 2.5 million grassroots donors by the end of this month. Will you join this team and be one of those donors? We’ll send you a free sticker as a personal thank you.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY1MjM3NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNDExODg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We set that goal to try to get back on pace so we'll have enough to punch back against Trump when it matters the most in these final weeks. The problem is, Derek, we’re not quite there.

Wishing and hoping that this race turns out for the best is not enough. Knowing that our candidate is in an entirely different league than Donald Trump is not enough. Honestly, even all the hard work and long hours we’ve put in over the past year are no longer enough.

**We’ve done the math and need 12 more people from your town to help us hit that mark. Can you be one of them and chip in now to guarantee that Donald Trump doesn’t edge us out in fundraising today, enthusiasm tomorrow, or votes in November?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY1MjM3NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNDExODg2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
If we don’t start to make some changes, Donald Trump may be the most powerful person in the world come 2017.

This is the most consequential election of our lifetimes. Let’s act like it.

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**

name: Aisling Kerins
subject: Fwd: Why it’s important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
You need to read Jay's email. | Dear Friend, Jay's email summed things up well. If you missed what he wrote, it's included below. We can't leave anything to chance. Republican attacks are coming -- and it's essential our Rapid Response Fund is topped up so we can outmaneuver them. Can we count on your support? | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTUyNTk4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTI5MTU4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thank you for standing with Jay.
Aisling Kerins
Campaign Director
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From:Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, Sep 15, 2016
Subject: Why it's important
Dear Friend,
I know how quickly things can change in elections.
That's why I'm urgently requesting your help to build our Rapid Response Fund.
**Our goal is $15,000 by mid night tomorrow. Can you help?**
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTUyNTk4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTI5MTU4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Between the deep pockets of my opponent's ultra-rich friends and the commitment of the Republican Governors Association to come after me, we know big money could turn this race upside down.
The GOP operatives behind his campaign are looking at the calendar and calculating when to launch their barrage of attack ads. Their hope is catching us flat-footed, unprepared to fight back -- and out of time to respond.
[**That 's why I'm asking you personally for a contribution today.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUyNTk4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTI5MTU4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
These Republican attacks are not something we can worry about later. There won't be time. Our Rapid Response Fund gives us the resources right now to prepare.
Thank you for standing with me.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTUyNTk4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTI5MTU4NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
If you're looking to help | Derek --

When I was under the weather, many of you asked if there was anything you could do for me. I appreciated your offers, and I'm excited to be back on the trail today -- good as new.

But if you’re still looking to help, there's something critical you can do for the campaign right here, right now.

**[We have to total 2.5 million grassroots donors by the end of this month and we still need 5 donations from your town to stay on track to reach that goal. Will you chip in now to help? You'll even get a free sticker as a thank you.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY1MjM5MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNDE3MDczS0&mt=1&rt=0) **

The team set this benchmark to ensure that we’re ready to sprint to the finish. With the first debate and the start of early voting right around the corner, your donation has never mattered more. Your support will make these crucial phone calls, doorbell rings, and television ads possible.

**Derek, your contribution before this deadline will make the difference in November. We absolutely must hit this goal:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY1MjM5MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNDE3MDczS0&mt=1&rt=0)
This dedicated team has already done such incredible things and I know that together, we can meet this goal and power into this final stretch together.

Thank you for making this happen,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**
| [

body:
A Conversation with Bishop E.W. Jackson
| [View this email in your browser. ](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vsnuPtvbdN)
---|---
---
| | **My Faith Votes**
presents
[My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with Bishop E.W. Jackson](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37601820:snuPtvbdN:m:1:876315805:E129F67D966B8DB92A782DB755CB9905:r)
**Host: **Megan West
**Topic:** Discussing the Importance of Constitution Day
**Date:** SEPT 17TH
**Time:** 4PM (ET) / 1PM (PT)
**_" Those who are in Christ are on the winning side. Part of what must happen during this period of great harvest for the kingdom of God is a massive wealth transfer. It is not going to happen by theft or governmental policy. It is going to happen supernaturally. Those invested in God's market are going to reap a windfall. Make up your mind now to buy in."_** \- Bishop E. W. Jackson

Get ready to be inspired. [Register for the interactive call](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37601820:snuPtvbdN:m:1:876315805:E129F67D966B8DB92A782DB755CB9905:r), or watch the live video stream at [My Faith Votes](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37601820:snuPtvbdN:m:1:876315805:E129F67D966B8DB92A782DB755CB9905:r) or [Facebook Live](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37601821:snuPtvbdN:m:1:876315805:E129F67D966B8DB92A782DB755CB9905:r) with Bishop E. W. Jackson as we celebrate Constitution Day and discuss whether the principles of our founding document still offer a blueprint for solving the real problems America faces. Rarely at a loss for words and enthusiastic lover of our Nation, Bishop Jackson is sure to inspire you with his passion to awaken the body of Christ and all Americans to the fundamental threat to the spiritual and moral foundations of our Constitutional Republic.

Bishop Jackson is the founder and current president of S.T.A.N.D. (Staying True To America's National Destiny), a non-profit organization dedicated to preserving life, the traditional family and our Judeo-Christian history and values as the Foundation of our Constitution and culture, and he is head pastor at Exodus Faith Ministries, located in Chesapeake, Virginia. A former marine, Bishop Jackson graduated Summa Cum Laude with a Phi Beta Kappa Key from the University of Massachusetts at Boston, and three years later graduated from Harvard Law School. While in law school, he was accepted into the Baptist ministry and studied at Harvard Divinity School.

[Sign up now for this LIVE EVENT on SATURDAY, SEPT 17TH 4PM (ET) / 1PM (PT)](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37601820:snuPtvbdN:m:1:876315805:E129F67D966B8DB92A782DB755CB9905:r).

Celebrate Constitution day with the My Faith Votes team and Bishop E. W. Jackson, Saturday, September 17th at 4PM (ET) / 1PM (PT), for this interactive, My Faith Matters LIVE Event, and get your questions ready as much time will be spent in live Q&A.

Look -- I know the Senate, and I know Pennsylvania.

So believe me when I say this: If we want the Senate to work again and put working families first again, then we need to make sure my friend, Katie McGinty, wins this race.

But I'm going to tell it to you straight now. Every poll shows this race is neck-and-neck -- and with Senate control hanging in the balance, special interests are spending BIG money to prop up Katie's opponent, Republican Senator Pat Toomey's campaign.

**So, that means what I 'm asking you to do right now isn't only urgent -- it's essential.**

[**Will you join me in supporting Katie today? Chip in now to help send Katie to Washington to fight for Pennsylvania 's working families >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7499465485289783296/8166458788073701376?refcode=e20160916&refcode2=e20160916nd&amount=25)

I served in the Senate for 36 years, and I've seen a lot. But the obstruction from Senate Republicans that we're witnessing now is unprecedented. They have _refused_ to fill the Supreme Court vacancy, _failed_ to pass common-sense gun safety laws, and even _turned their back_ to the dangers of the Zika virus to women and their families.

But if there's one thing I know about the people of Pennsylvania -- the people of America -- it's that they won't just stand by while things fall apart.

So, friends, let's do what we've always done when the going gets tough: Dig deep, be courageous, and give it everything we've got over the next 53 days to make this country stronger.

name: John Kasich
subject: Why I was in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich
body:
This morning, I participated in a bipartisan strategy session at
the White House to discuss and call for the passage of the
12-country TPP trade agreement currently being considered by
Congress.

Peter, this morning, I
participated in a bipartisan strategy session at the White House
to discuss and call for the passage of the 12-country TPP trade
agreement currently being considered by Congress.
Free trade is not only a powerful
driver of job creation for Americans but it's also a national
security issue. There's no better tool for America to encourage
other nations to embrace freedom and equality than healthy trade
relationships. That's why I will always put politics to the side
and push for what is right for our country.
You can watch my CNN interview
with Dana Bash here:

Trade - and the competition it
encourages - has brought us a better quality of life and advances
in technology that were unimaginable just a few years ago. While
I may have misgivings about much of the President's economic
agenda, the Trans-Pacific Partnership trade expansion is right
for America and will guarantee that our products, services and
the workers behind them can succeed in the fastest growing
consumer market in the world.

Please also take a moment to read
my op-ed in the Wall Street Journal about the benefits of free
trade.

• Wall Street Journal: A
Vote Against Trade is a Vote Against Growth

Will you help me share this on
social media?

Finally, be sure to tune in to
Meet The Press on Sunday morning as I'll join Chuck Todd to
discuss this meeting and my support for a free trade agenda for
America. Find your local listing (here).

Thank you.

-John

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

for America

name: Michelle Kleppe, HillaryClinton.com
subject: We're hoping we can count on you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| Derek --

We’re officially heading into the final sprint towards Election Day, so we're making every investment we can in states that will deliver Hillary a historic victory this fall.

At this point, there is nothing more important than building our ground game -- organizers, offices, and volunteers -- in Virginia, because without as many voters as possible pulling the lever for Hillary, we don’t have a viable road to the White House. Every door knocked and every voter registered gets us a little bit closer to victory.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you.

**[Right now we’re assembling a team of our best supporters who would be willing to knock on doors and talk to voters in Virginia. Can we add your name to this list? We’re working on this plan as we speak, and it’s only going to work if we have every pair of hands on deck.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjY1MjM5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNDE3NDkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

You’ve been with Hillary every step of this campaign, and each time you’ve chipped in, volunteered for a shift, or stood with her at a critical moment, we’ve noticed. Literally nothing up until now would have been possible without you, and we couldn’t be more grateful.

That’s why we know you would be perfect for this next part of the race, when we shift to turning out every possible vote for Hillary. You’ll be a part of the team that is going the extra mile to make sure we take a giant leap forward as a nation when the final votes are cast on November 8th. You can be a more integral part of making that history.

**Let us know today if we can count on you to be on this essential crew of supporters. It could mean all the difference as we wage the fight of our lives:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY1MjM5MjkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNDE3NDkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks so much,

Michelle

Michelle Kleppe
Organizing Director
Hillary for America

| Everyone -- This is a new low, even for Marco Rubio.

Yesterday, he introduced sham legislation on gun violence prevention. The bill would achieve almost nothing -- it's just an attempt to disguise his record of consistently voting with the NRA. [**Sign here to call on Marco Rubio to represent Floridians and take real action against gun violence >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d23/738133e4/31c2cdb1/7f855b4b/375822593/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160916/?subsource=ngpattre160916")

Rubio must be hoping we've forgotten the facts:
1. **Marco Rubio is endorsed by, funded by, and rated "A+" by the NRA. **
2. He used the the deaths of 49 innocent Floridians at Pulse as a reason to run for re-election.
3. After Orlando, he said he doesn't "believe that guns are the cause of violence."
4. Since then, he's voted against **every** bill that would would help prevent mass shootings and keep our families safe.
5. He even voted against a bipartisan measure to prevent people on the No Fly List from purchasing guns.

**Marco Rubio continues to stand with the gun lobby instead of keeping Floridians safe. Floridians deserve better.[Sign here if you agree >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d23/738133e4/31c2cdb1/7f855b4a/375822593/VEsF/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160916/?subsource=ngpattre160916")**

Thanks for standing with us,
Team Murphy

PS: Even Sen. Chris Murphy, who bravely filibustered for gun violence prevention earlier this year, called out Marco Rubio's political opportunism: | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d23/738133e4/31c2cdb1/7f855b4a/375822593/VEsC/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com/landing/e160916/?subsource=ngpattre160916")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: It's Not That Hard—Stand Up for the Pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

I'm writing today because I saw something in the news that really bothered me. During Wednesday's veto session, one of our state senators refused to stand for the Pledge of Allegiance. That's wrong.

I'm proud to stand for the Pledge of Allegiance. I served with brave men and women who gave their lives so that we could do so.

One of the greatest things about America is the right to free speech. But, in a free society like ours, it is important to know the difference between having the right, and being right. While this State Senator may have a right to protest, that doesn't make her actions right.

The Pledge of Allegiance is a promise. It's a promise to pursue the ideal that we are one nation, under God, indivisible, with liberty and justice for all. Of course, we have work to do to fully live up to our pledge. But when a politician refuses to stand up for the Pledge of Allegiance, they're really rejecting that mission.

I sent out a [video](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e813a9381c&e=84041254e6) this morning and [shared my thoughts](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=b3f7ca33b7&e=84041254e6) on this story right away, because I believe it's important for leaders to stand up for our ideals and our country.
[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e065f168fa&e=84041254e6)
I'm curious where Chris Koster is going to decide he stands on this issue. I haven't heard anything from him, and I've got to say that's disappointing. If Chris Koster won't stand up for the Pledge of Allegiance when a member of his party disrespects it, what will he stand up for?

I hope you'll all take a moment today to reflect on what the Pledge means. Each of our team members will take some time today to recite the Pledge of Allegiance, and I encourage you to do so as well.

If you're willing to [stand with us](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=255a45c219&e=84041254e6) and fight for our flag, we'd be honored to have you. We've got a great team of [volunteers](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=a7dcf59488&e=84041254e6) working every day to take our state in a new direction.

Best,
Eric Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=6d07c57731), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=595be91450&e=84041254e6) with us!

Friends, One of the highlights of my basketball career at North Carolina was the 1975 ACC Tournament in the Greensboro Coliseum. I'll never forget cutting down those nets with my teammates after winning the championship. The news this week that the ACC is pulling all neutral-site championships because of HB2 was tough for many North Carolinians. **Communities all over the state are suffering from this needless, discriminatory law. body:

[](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a6/7be36b49/1e824f45/78f8666c/989506/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-mmsept?refcode=20160916nd&amount=10") Friend -- Our state has a choice this year. On one hand, we can reelect a politician with a record of extreme partisanship and putting special interests above the needs of everyday Hoosiers. On the other hand, we can elect a proven leader, who hears all sides of every issue and works to find the common ground, and who always, always, puts Indiana first.

**So who 's it going to be? _That depends on what you do right now, friend._**

**[Can you help us hit our mid-September goal by pitching $5 before midnight tonight?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a6/7be36b49/1e824f45/78f8666c/989506/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-mmsept?refcode=20160916nd&amount=10")**

Next week will mark just 50 days until the election. And with Koch puppet Congressman Todd Young narrowing his deficit in the polls (while getting tons of ad help from dark money groups), we don't have a lot of time to shore up Evan's lead and ensure a win on November 8th.

Hence all the emails you're getting from our team. I know it's a lot, but we _really_ need to hit this $15,000 goal in order to stay on track and win the election.

**[Please, will you make a $5 donation before midnight tonight?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504a6/7be36b49/1e824f45/78f8666c/989506/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-mmsept?refcode=20160916nd&amount=10")**

| Derek --

This Sunday, we’re teaming up with actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson, Wicked writer Stephen Schwartz, and Fun Home composer Jeanine Tesori to host a “Bank with Broadway” phone bank with Broadway stars and fans.

We’ll be hosting Facebook Live sessions throughout the day, so even if you can't be there in person, you can have a front-row seat to all the Broadway festivities! **[Sign up for a shift now to let us know that we can count on you to make calls from home](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY1MzIyNzQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTQ4NzI5S0&mt=1&rt=0)** and we’ll send you information on when and how you can tune into the Broadway fun.

Making calls is more important than ever -- so we’re going all out and asking you to join the fight to make sure we reach everyone on our lists before voting starts.

**Join us this Sunday from the comfort of your own home and help us reach out to all our potential supporters and confirm they’re voting for Hillary.**

| Greetings,
---
| **Team Scott is excited to have helped introduce Phil’s comprehensive, 12-part plan for economic growth this week – showing why he is the best candidate to help make Vermont more affordable.** But that wasn’t all. Check out this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign.

**A CLEAR CHOICE – PHIL LAYS OUT BLUEPRINT FOR ECONOMIC GROWTH**
The economy and making Vermont more affordable are the most important issues in this election, and Phil again demonstrated why **he is the only candidate dedicated to making those issues Montpelier’s top priority**. Phil released a comprehensive economic development plan at a press conference, where he was joined by 20 legislators and Vermont business leaders. The plan contains more than 50 specific proposals, initiatives, and ideas to strengthen the economy and make Vermont more affordable.

**We hope you will view – and share – the full plan**[**HERE**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fe7851776b&e=19cebfe173), but the pillars of the plan include:
* Protecting jobs and retaining current employers;
* Expanding our workforce and workforce training opportunities;
* Revitalizing our county economic centers, expanding innovation hubs and designating high-tech zones;
* Putting healthcare reform back on track;
* Increasing the availability of good homes working families can afford;
* Advancing pro-growth, pro-jobs tax policy;
* Modernizing state government; and
* Setting parameters to ensure state spending does not grow faster than the economy or your wages.

You can also read more about the plan from the _Times Argus_ [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=697654bddc&e=19cebfe173).

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT
**_What they’re saying_**
We’re excited to see Vermonters have already taken a look at Phil’s plan and are joining the conversation. Here’s what they’re saying:

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

***
**OUR OPIATE EPIDEMIC**
The opiate epidemic facing Vermont and the entire nation is tragic and is one of our most serious health and safety challenges. Phil has long-committed to continuing and expanding on Vermont’s leadership in addressing this crisis. He issued a statement this week regarding a deadly new opiate that’s caused a spike in overdoses in Ohio, which you can view [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d3969c2e56&e=19cebfe173). As he said, this is an issue where we must remain vigilant to new developments and heightened health risks. Read more on Phil’s plan to address this crisis [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=634ce79274&e=19cebfe173).
*******
**SO MANY EVENTS, SO LITTLE TIME**
Team Scott’s schedule was jam-packed this week but with so many great causes to support, people to meet and mac n’ cheese to taste, you couldn’t hold us back. We met with the **Rutland County Firefighters’ Association** and **Addison County** residents at their Fall Dinner, before Phil served as a judge at the **Vermont Farmstead Mac n’ Cheese Challenge**. And, we were excited to participate in **Burlington’s Pride Parade** and **St. Johnsbury’s Walk to End Alzheimer’s** over the weekend, rounding out the week at the **VADA Luncheon**.

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT
Catch us over the next week at the [Vermont Affordable Housing Coalition](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2ec3e256cf&e=19cebfe173), the [Vermont Commission on Women Forum](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5e125034f7&e=19cebfe173) and the [Windsor County Gubernatorial Forum](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2628e87756&e=19cebfe173). And view all of our upcoming Events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4d0f1a7494&e=19cebfe173).
***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_Phil: Addressing our affordability crisis_**
“The cost of living in Vermont is simply outpacing growth of the incomes of many Vermont families. My plan confronts Vermont’s affordability crisis and restores our state’s focus on the economic and fiscal priorities that support job retention and creation.” (Source: Vermont Press Bureau: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d67081987c&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil: We’re all in this together:_**
**“** Together, we can strengthen the economy, expand the middle class through real growth and lift take-home wages. But we must be focused and work together.” (Source: Vermont Business Magazine: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f4854b8483&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil: Vermonters need relief_**
"Spending more than we are taking in is not sustainable," Scott said. "It's something that adds to the high burden of fees and taxes on every day Vermonters." (Source: WPTZ: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=98e262c84e&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil Scott’s Record of on the Economy_**
“What was Scott doing while Minter was proposing tax increases and economic development cuts? Scott introduced legislation to streamline business permitting routes and appeals to improve the economic climate. Scott was a co-sponsor of bipartisan legislation to promote economic development in downtown areas by expanding economic incentives and benefits to town centers. Both of these pieces of legislation were incorporated into law.” – Edward Dublois, Manchester Center (Source: Manchester Journal: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0a30d095a3&e=19cebfe173))

**_The Right Approach to Education_**
“Gubernatorial candidate Phil Scott and lieutenant governor candidate Randy Brock support affordable — but not free — education to all state institutions of higher learning. This approach is more doable and is fair to all concerned.” – James Black, Stow (Source: Stowe Reporter: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b7c43588c3&e=19cebfe173))

**_Time for a change_**
**_“_** A more accountable path to transparency and fiscal responsibility is to vote for Steve Webster for senator in Orange County and Phil Scott for governor.” – William Kevan, Randolph (Source: Times Argus: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=94a07c03d2&e=19cebfe173))
***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**_Vermont Public Radio: Vermont Banks Say Minter’s Tuition-Free Plan Will Have “Detrimental” Effects_**
There is a **clear contrast between Phil and his opponent** , and Vermont Public Radio (VPR) highlighted that contrast this week. Examining Phil’s opponent’s plan to offer free tuition, the article highlights the economic impact of this plan, which will impose a tax on Vermont banks.

Chris D’Elia, president of the Vermont Bankers Association, told VPR:
“**’It’s going to be a job destruction policy, because my banks will cut positions** ,’ D’Elia says. **Minter’s plan would _increase the bank franchise tax_ , and make some banks in Vermont subject to the corporate income tax**, something they’re exempt from now. D’Elia says the move would **likely result in _branch closures_ across the state**. And he says it **would compel bigger banks to _cease investing in Vermont_** , and seek friendlier pastures elsewhere.”

**Phil knows Vermonters and Vermont businesses _cannot afford any additional taxes or fees_**. **We need to** **support and grow Vermont businesses** , not push them out of state or create policies that will pass fees on to Vermonters. Instead, we need to grow revenue organically by supporting Vermont business and growing our workforce. Read more about his plans for economic growth [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=48168b8450&e=19cebfe173) and read the full VPR article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=cef26cf3cb&e=19cebfe173).
*******
Thanks to everyone for continuing to follow and support our campaign. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities every day – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=af3e130419&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8168235fcd&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

We've come up with two fantastic designs for our official Thanks Obama tote bag -- but we need your help to decide which one to make!
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f0d1/2b07114c/79963c8a/73ed0fe0/2378896838/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/tote-vote")

Friend, did you see President Obama's fantastic speech on the campaign trail this week?

subject: re: Trump’s recovery
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
We always knew the race would be close | Derek --

In poll after poll, we're seeing the same trend: Trump's numbers have recovered after his tough summer, and today we're neck and neck.

Yesterday, for example, a new CBS/_New York Times_ survey had us tied with Trump when you factor in third-party candidates.

In the battleground states, we’re seeing an even more dramatic example of that trend -- one poll this week in Ohio has us down by three; another has us down by five.

We always knew this race would tighten up -- but that's happening while we’re also seeing a surge in Trump’s fundraising and ground game. That’s a dangerous combination, and we need to fight back.**[Can you help us get closer to our end-of-month goal of 2.5 grassroots donors right now -- make your first donation and get a free sticker, too?](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY1MzQzMjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTY0NzU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Trump isn’t going to let up on the lies and attacks against Hillary that are helping him surge in the polls -- and we can’t necessarily count on the media to fact-check him. Our team needs to continue to do that vital work to make sure voters know the truth about who Hillary is and what she’s fighting for in this campaign: all of us.

**Trump’s donors are chipping in at unprecedented rates, but I know we can do even more for Hillary -- and for our country. Chip in $1 right now, and let’s stop Trump’s momentum cold:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY1MzQzMjES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNTY0NzU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
